rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Synthesizes vulnerability rates and CWE-based security findings for AI-generated code.
rationale.quality-debt: Synthesizes low correctness, complexity degradation, and developer intervention findings.
rationale.lit-review: Synthesizes evidence from academic studies, industry reports, and deployment data.
rationale.survey-input: Provides substantive adoption, acceptance, satisfaction, and implementation-barrier findings.
rationale.assistive: Evidence primarily concerns human-initiated Copilot suggestions and code completions.
rationale.demote:context: Secondary synthesis is contextual rather than primary empirical evidence.
